name: Mashed Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together cream cheese, garlic salt, pepper, and sour cream; set aside.
2. Boil quartered potatoes in water until tender. Drain the potatoes.
3. Using an electric mixer or potato masher, beat the hot potatoes until they form fine lumps.
4. Add the sour cream mixture to the beaten potatoes and continue beating until smooth.
5. Spoon the potatoes into a well-buttered 2-quart casserole dish. Dot with butter and sprinkle with paprika.
6. If made ahead of time, cover and refrigerate until the next day.
7. Bake, covered, in a 400°F oven for 25 minutes (50 minutes if refrigerated).
8. Uncover and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
9. Garnish with parsley sprigs, if desired. Makes 6 servings.
